load.returns: BoardState | null — null if absent or corrupt.

save.returns: void — writes to localStorage synchronously (or after small debounce).

STORAGE_KEY.notes: Stable string constant, e.g. 'kanban-board:v1'. Used by tests to clear before runs.

notes: integration calls load() at boot, then registers save as a state-model subscriber so every mutation autosaves (per A7).
